lesson: HTR FAIL with the log showing the lid open mid-cycle and every component reading healthy means the cycle was simply interrupted. Re-run it — no parts needed.
symptoms: Display says HTR FAIL 12 and nothing else.

tests.error-log: Heat-treat cycle aborted at 2:47 am — lid logged open mid-cycle, barrel never reached pasteurisation temp.
tests.temp-probe: Mix and barrel temps in spec right now. Heater gets warm when commanded.
tests.continuity-test: Heater element and mix temp sensor both read perfectly in spec.

flavour: Turned it off and on again, professionally.
authenticityNote: The infamous overnight heat-treat lockout (GDD §2.2) — an interrupted pasteurisation cycle locks the machine out until a tech re-runs it. Most of the time nothing is broken, which is exactly why the machines are 'always broken'.
